title: Tutóia Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tutóia, with a Z-Score of +3.31. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tutóia is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, and wind speed is 15.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, while the high CDD value shows a significant cooling demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
